name: A-AUDIT

principal_agent.category: Constitutional architecture (the constitution itself is the principal)

description: The Watchdog. Support (internal control-plane) agent that continuously monitors all 3 primary federation agents (333-AGI, 555-ASI, 888-APEX). Verifies outputs against F1-F13 floors independently. Cannot issue verdicts — only flags, reports, and escalates to 888-APEX. Cannot be bypassed or disabled by any primary agent. Watches the watchers.

provider.organization: arifOS by Muhammad Arif bin Fazil

bearer_auth.description: arifOS session token (JWT) issued after 000-SALAM sovereign handshake

api_key.name: X-ArifOS-Key
api_key.description: Static API key for organ-to-organ federation calls

skills.name: Floor Compliance Check
skills.description: Independently verify any agent output against all 13 constitutional floors (F1-F13). Returns per-floor pass/fail with evidence citations. Operates independently of 888-APEX to provide second-opinion assurance.
examples: Verify 333-AGI's prospect analysis against F1-F13
Check if 555-ASI's ethical critique itself passes F5 Humility
Audit 888-APEX's last 10 verdicts for consistency

skills.name: Inter-Agent Consistency Check
skills.description: Detect contradictions or inconsistencies between outputs of different primary agents. If 333-AGI says X and 555-ASI says ¬X, flag as CONFLICT and escalate to 888-APEX for arbitration.
examples: 333-AGI rated risk as LOW but 555-ASI flagged RED — investigate
Check alignment between reasoning (333) and ethical review (555)

skills.name: Agent Behavioral Health Monitor
skills.description: Track agent behavior patterns over time. Detect drift (e.g. increasing overconfidence, decreasing uncertainty disclosure, floor violation trends). Generate periodic health reports for human sovereign review.
examples: Has 333-AGI's uncertainty disclosure rate changed this week?
Generate monthly agent behavioral health report
Detect any systematic floor violations across all agents

skills.name: FFF Loop Protocol
skills.description: 5-pass recursive audit sequence: Blue → Red → Blue → Yellow → Gold. Emits skill artifacts + MEMORY line + drift signal. Must be ATTESTED then LEASED. F1, F4, F8, F11 enforced.
examples: Run FFF audit on a new constitutional patch
Verify all skill registrations for floor compliance

skills.name: arifOS Constitutional Audit (Light)
skills.description: Read-only constitutional audit. Independent from 888-APEX — provides second-opinion floor verification. Six-organ gap analysis, lexical priority check, blast-radius 888 HOLD bypass detection. F1, F2, F4, F7, F9, F11, F13 enforced.
examples: Independent audit of 888-APEX verdict
Six-organ gap analysis without 888 involvement

skills.name: Claim-Heavy Essay Audit
skills.description: Post-drafting fact-audit gate for any claim-heavy essay, blog, public artifact. Catches over-claims (CLAIM stated as fact when source supports only PLAUSIBLE/ESTIMATE/HYPOTHESIS), hallucinated names, fabricated citations. F2, F9 enforced.
examples: Audit the ILMU essay for over-claims
Catch hallucinated sources in a public artifact

skills.name: Orthodoxy Auditor
skills.description: Audit context files for orthogonality, modularity, plasticity. Runs after any context file edit or on demand. F1, F4, F8 enforced.
examples: Audit the SOUL.md file for doctrinal drift
Check orthogonal modularity of AGENTS.md

skills.name: Repository Hygiene Audit
skills.description: Inspect a GitHub repo for structural chaos, authority conflicts, cleanup needs. Produce audit report and remediation plan. F1, F11 enforced. LEASED.
examples: Audit AAA repo for structural chaos
Detect authority conflicts in agent cards

skills.name: MCP Server Smoke Test
skills.description: Validate that MCP servers respond correctly to health probes and basic tool calls. Detect down servers, mismatched schemas, and transport errors. ATTESTED.
examples: Smoke test the arifOS MCP server after restart
Detect schema mismatch in a new MCP registration

skills.name: Symbolic Order — Trust Architecture
skills.description: Map structural trust in the federation — where trust is architecture-enforced vs. history-based. Detects trust symmetry violations and single-points-of-failure. Implements E1+E2 from Wawa's agentic anthropology (Hybrid Civilization + Trust Is Structural).
examples: Map trust architecture across all 7 organs
Find single-points-of-failure in trust relationships
Check if arifOS has reciprocal structural trust

skills.name: Symbolic Order — Collective Bias Detection
skills.description: Detect collective bias in agent populations using Ashery-Aiello-Baronchelli naming game protocol. Catches biases that emerge at population level but no individual agent shows. Chi-square test against uniform distribution. Implements E5 (Collective Bias Invisible to Single-Agent).
examples: Detect if a convention has locked in across agent population
Find collective bias invisible to individual-agent analysis
Run naming game protocol on A2A logs
